name: Reader Mode Bridge
short_description: A deterministic local reader cleanup helper that turns saved HTML, copied article text, or PDF excerpts into a clean handoff with preserved metadata.
audience: People moving long reads into notes or read-later stacks
detail_lines: Cleans clipboard text, saved HTML, markdown, text files, and local PDF excerpts into one readable handoff without remote services.
Can attach front-browser-tab metadata so copied article text keeps its title and source URL when it moves into notes or prompts.
Exports markdown, plain text, prompt text, or JSON while surfacing cleanup notes, reading length, and any truncation clearly.
